emily collected 24 blueberries. david collected 15 more blueberries than emily and three times as many as sophia. they used their blueberries to make muffins. one batch of muffins required 9 blueberries and they sold each batch for 5.  

***  

david collected 15 more blueberries than emily, so he collected 24 plus 15, which is 39 blueberries. david also collected three times as many as sophia, so sophia collected 39 divided by 3, which is 13 blueberries. in total, emily collected 24, david collected 39, and sophia collected 13. they used all the blueberries to make muffins.  

***  

each batch of muffins required 9 blueberries, so they made 24 divided by 9, which is 2 full batches and 6 blueberries left. they sold each batch for 5, so they made 2 times 5, which is 10 dollars. the total amount of money they made from the blueberries they collected is 10 dollars.
